channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Comment un agent IA met à jour votre spec API avec la CLI Apidog
item.description: Modifier une spécification d’API à la main est une tâche précise et répétitive : renommer un champ, ajouter une valeur d’énumération ou rendre un paramètre obligatoire. Avec un agent IA, ces...

item.title: Agentic Workflows Should Get Less Agentic | Focused Labs
item.description: Agentic workflows are supposed to get boring. The first pass can be exploratory and pretty expensive. The tenth pass should be boring and not have to rediscover the solution through a completely...

item.title: Google and Epic give up fighting — third-party Android app stores are coming next week
item.description: Epic Games and Google have just jointly withdrawn their attempt to retroactively settle the lawsuit that's changing how Android app stores work in the United States - and that means Google will be...

item.title: 用FROST家族治理模型，设计一个AI学习共同体
item.description: 用FROST家族治理模型，设计一个"AI学习共同体" 作者：神通说 日期：2026-07-15 主题：双项目联动 | 周三轮换 阅读时间：10分钟 缘起：一个人做培训，最怕什么？ 最近我在做一个训练营项目——"破局·动态能力生长实战营"。 一个人做培训，听起来很美好，但实际操作起来，光是每天回答重复问题就足以拖垮一个人： "课程在哪看？" "作业怎么交？"...

item.title: Stop Your LLMs from Forgetting (Part 2): How a Graph-Anchor Pyramid Cures AI’s Relational Blindspots
item.description: Have you ever had a brilliant solution get completely crushed by a single comment on a technical blog post? Just last week, on July 8, 2026, I published a post introducing the Pyramid Aggregator....

item.title: Saving Money on AI APIs? Start With These 30 Models
item.description: Saving Money on AI APIs? Start With These 30 Models I'll be honest with you. When I finished my coding bootcamp, I thought I had this whole AI thing figured out. I knew how to call an API. I knew...

item.title: n/a is not a verdict
item.description: There are three things a check can tell you. It passed. It failed. Or it couldn't run — the thing it measures isn't here. Most tools only have room for the first two, so the third gets folded into...

item.title: How PWA (Progressive Web Apps) are Changing the Mobile Gaming Landscape
item.description: For over a decade, mobile game distribution has been held in a tight duopoly. If you wanted to get your mobile game in front of users, you had to play by the rules of the Apple App Store or Google...

item.title: The Project That Changed Everything: How Tutoring Juniors on SQL Led Me to Data Engineering
item.description: Prefacing A year ago, I would've laughed if you told me this was coming. Back in high school I did this weird thing where I was doing an Associate's in Software Engineering at the same time as...

item.title: I Built an AI Search Visibility Checker — and Found Out My Own Site Was Invisible
item.description: I Built an AI Search Visibility Checker — and Found Out My Own Site Was Invisible I launched my first Apify Actor a few weeks ago. Spent time on SEO, structured data, the whole checklist. Then I...

item.title: [Boost]
item.description: I've Changed My Opinion On Vibe Coding Brad Traversy Brad Traversy Brad Traversy Follow May 18 I've Changed My Opinion On Vibe Coding #ai #productivity #programming #vibecoding 4 reactions 5...

item.title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
item.description: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.

item.title: Lorde says AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
item.description: "Increasingly in our world, it gets harder and harder to know what is real," Lorde said onstage.

item.title: Nothing’s good-looking Watch 3 Pro smartwatch is just $69
item.description: While most fitness trackers are losing the screens to keep the price low, the CMF by Nothing Watch 3 Pro is a bit different. The budget-friendly smartwatch with a 1.43-inch OLED display is even...

item.title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
item.description: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and...

item.title: Microsoft’s Secure Boot has been broken for a decade and no one noticed until now
item.description: Old and forgotten "shims" Microsoft failed to revoke have made Secure Boot bypasses simple.

item.title: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit
item.description: OpenAI has issued another statement on the lawsuit, this time suggesting it lacks merit.

item.title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
item.description: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

item.title: Windows 11’s big patch Tuesday allows you to hold off on updates for longer
item.description: Microsoft just released a long list of improvements for Windows 11 as part of its bigger patch Tuesdays, and that includes the ability to pause updates indefinitely, as reported earlier by Windows...

item.title: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
item.description: OpenAI's first device is set to be a smart speaker that lets you talk with ChatGPT, according to a report from Bloomberg. The device apparently won't have a screen, but will use a camera and...

item.title: Microsoft Patches Record 622 Flaws, Including Two Zero-Days Under Active Attack
item.description: Microsoft shipped its largest Patch Tuesday on record today, and two of the fixes close holes that attackers are already exploiting. The release covers 622 of Microsoft's own CVEs by its Security...

item.title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
item.description: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to...

item.title: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
item.description: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem...

item.title: The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone
item.description: Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."

item.title: SpaceXAI’s Grok programming tool was uploading its users’ entire codebase to cloud storage
item.description: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was spotted uploading users' entire codebases to Google Cloud before it was reported, and the company turned it off. The Register reports that Cereblab...

item.title: Microsoft Patches a Record 570 Security Flaws
item.description: Microsoft Corp. today released software updates to plug at least 570 security holes in its Windows operating systems and other software, almost triple the number of vulnerabilities the software...

item.title: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
item.description: Hachette, Cengage, Elsevier, and other publishers allege that Google trained its AI on copyrighted works without the necessary permissions.

item.title: SAP Patches CVSS 9.9 NetWeaver ABAP Flaw That Could Expose or Modify Data
item.description: SAP has rolled out updates to address multiple vulnerabilities as part of its July 2026 security updates, including a critical flaw in SAP NetWeaver Application Server ABAP. The vulnerability in...

item.title: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI
item.description: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is proposing an AI "standards body" modeled after FINRA, to test frontier models and develop best practices for their release.

item.title: Philips Hue’s budget-friendly Essential starter kit has hit a new low price
item.description: Although most of Prime Day’s unusually good Philips Hue deals have ended, a few remain, and some, including the black Philips Hue Twilight Sleep and Wake-Up Light, are even cheaper. None, however,...
